_**User**_

Necesito desarrollar un módulo personalizado para Odoo 18 llamado:

kc_product_custom_specs_lot

====================================================
OBJETIVO GENERAL
====================================================

La empresa vende productos metálicos por especificación técnica.

Actualmente usan variantes de producto, pero esto NO es funcional porque:
- genera demasiadas variantes
- las especificaciones son dinámicas
- no existe stock real por variante
- el negocio trabaja por especificación técnica
- el inventario debe diferenciarse por lote

NO se deben usar variantes.
NO se debe usar product.attribute.
NO se debe usar product.attribute.value.
NO se usará MRP por ahora.

El flujo será:

Cotización de venta
→ Confirmación de venta
→ Inventario por lotes
→ Entrega
→ Factura

La idea es:

- El producto es GENÉRICO.
- Las especificaciones viven en la línea de venta.
- El lote representa la especificación técnica del stock.

====================================================
REGLAS DE NEGOCIO
====================================================

1. NO usar variantes de producto.

2. Un lote representa una especificación técnica.

3. Si una línea vende:
- mismo producto
- mismas especificaciones
- cantidad 10

Entonces:
- debe existir UN SOLO lote con cantidad 10
- NO 10 lotes distintos

4. Los atributos cambian según el producto.

Ejemplos:
- Ducto usa ancho, alto, longitud y calibre
- Codo usa grados
- Bandeja usa altura y superficie

5. Los vendedores deben poder:
- llenar especificaciones técnicas
- buscar stock compatible
- seleccionar un lote existente
- copiar especificaciones desde otra línea

6. Si no existe stock:
- el lote se crea automáticamente al confirmar la venta

7. El lote debe guardar:
- especificaciones
- descripción técnica
- clave técnica comparable

8. Los reportes deben mostrar:
- especificaciones técnicas
- lote utilizado

====================================================
EJEMPLOS DE PRODUCTOS GENÉRICOS
====================================================

- Ducto Portacable Cuadrado
- Codo Ducto Cuadrado
- Bandeja Portacable Escalera
- Lámina
- Perfil
- Producto Metálico a Medida

====================================================
EJEMPLOS DE ATRIBUTOS
====================================================

- Perfil
- Ancho
- Alto
- Longitud
- Lámina
- Calibre
- Grados
- Ancho Mayor
- Ancho Menor
- Fondo
- Tamaño
- Altura
- Superficie

====================================================
ARQUITECTURA
====================================================

El sistema debe funcionar así:

PRODUCTO GENÉRICO
+
ESPECIFICACIONES EN SALE.ORDER.LINE
+
LOTE CON ESPECIFICACIONES
=
STOCK DIFERENCIADO

====================================================
MODELOS
====================================================

====================================================
1. MODELO DE ATRIBUTOS TÉCNICOS
====================================================

Modelo:
custom.technical.attribute

Campos:
- name Char required
- code Char required
- display_type Selection:
    - selection
    - radio
    - numeric
    - text
- uom_id Many2one uom.uom optional
- active Boolean default True
- sequence Integer

====================================================
2. VALORES DE ATRIBUTOS
====================================================

Modelo:
custom.technical.attribute.value

Campos:
- attribute_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute required
- name Char required
- code Char
- sequence Integer
- active Boolean default True

====================================================
3. ATRIBUTOS PERMITIDOS POR PRODUCTO
====================================================

Extender:
product.template

Agregar:
- technical_attribute_line_ids One2many

Modelo:
custom.product.technical.attribute.line

Campos:
- product_tmpl_id Many2one product.template required
- attribute_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute required
- required Boolean default True
- sequence Integer
- allowed_value_ids Many2many custom.technical.attribute.value
- default_value_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute.value optional

Cada producto debe tener sus propios atributos.

====================================================
4. ATRIBUTOS EN SALE.ORDER.LINE
====================================================

Modelo:
custom.sale.order.line.technical.value

Campos:
- sale_order_line_id Many2one sale.order.line required
- attribute_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute required
- display_type related stored
- value_text Char
- value_number Float
- value_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute.value
- uom_id Many2one uom.uom
- sequence Integer
- required Boolean

====================================================
5. EXTENDER SALE.ORDER.LINE
====================================================

Agregar campos:

- technical_value_ids One2many
- technical_description Text compute stored
- technical_key Char compute stored indexed
- lot_id Many2one stock.lot
- compatible_lot_qty Float compute
- has_compatible_stock Boolean compute

====================================================
COMPORTAMIENTO EN SALE.ORDER.LINE
====================================================

Cuando el usuario selecciona product_id:

1. Limpiar atributos anteriores
2. Cargar atributos configurados en product.template
3. Mostrar UI dinámica de especificaciones

====================================================
UX REQUERIDO EN VENTAS
====================================================

NO crear pantalla separada.

La experiencia debe sentirse integrada en la línea de venta.

La línea debe tener una sección expandible:

Ejemplo visual:

Producto: Ducto Portacable Cuadrado
Cantidad: 10

▼ Especificaciones Técnicas
--------------------------------
Ancho:        [ 2" ]
Alto:         [ 2" ]
Longitud:     [ 8Ft ]
Lámina:       [ LG ]
Calibre:      [ C22 ]

Stock compatible: 12 unidades

[ Buscar stock compatible ]
[ Copiar especificaciones ]

====================================================
IMPORTANTE
====================================================

Visualmente:
- parece parte de sale.order.line

Técnicamente:
- usa One2many dinámico

NO crear campos fijos tipo:
- x_ancho
- x_alto
- x_longitud

Porque cada producto usa atributos diferentes.

====================================================
DESCRIPCIÓN TÉCNICA
====================================================

technical_description debe generar:

Ancho: 2"
Alto: 2"
Longitud: 8Ft
Lámina: LG
Calibre: C22

====================================================
CLAVE TÉCNICA
====================================================

technical_key debe generar:

ANCHO=2|ALTO=2|LONGITUD=8FT|LAMINA=LG|CALIBRE=C22

Esta clave será usada para:
- buscar lotes compatibles
- comparar especificaciones
- evitar duplicados

====================================================
BUSCAR STOCK COMPATIBLE
====================================================

Agregar botón:

"Buscar stock compatible"

El botón debe aparecer solo:
- cuando haya producto
- cuando existan atributos llenos

====================================================
COMPORTAMIENTO
====================================================

Al presionar:

1. Buscar stock.lot con:
- mismo product_id
- mismo technical_key
- cantidad disponible > 0

2. Abrir wizard/listado mostrando:

- lote
- ubicación
- cantidad disponible
- technical_description

3. Permitir seleccionar lote.

4. Guardar lote en:
sale.order.line.lot_id

====================================================
INDICADORES VISUALES
====================================================

En la línea mostrar:

- "Disponible: X"
- "Sin stock compatible"
- "Lote seleccionado: XXXX"

====================================================
COPIAR ESPECIFICACIONES
====================================================

Agregar acción:

"Copiar especificaciones"

Debe permitir:
- seleccionar otra línea de venta
- copiar todos los technical_value_ids

====================================================
6. EXTENDER STOCK.LOT
====================================================

Agregar campos:

- technical_description Text
- technical_key Char indexed
- sale_order_id Many2one sale.order
- sale_order_line_id Many2one sale.order.line
- partner_id Many2one res.partner optional
- source_type Selection:
    - sale
    - inventory
    - manual

- technical_value_ids One2many

====================================================
MODELO DE ATRIBUTOS EN LOTES
====================================================

Modelo:
custom.stock.lot.technical.value

Campos:
- lot_id Many2one stock.lot required
- attribute_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute required
- display_type related stored
- value_text Char
- value_number Float
- value_id Many2one custom.technical.attribute.value
- uom_id Many2one uom.uom
- sequence Integer

====================================================
7. CONFIRMACIÓN DE VENTA
====================================================

Extender:
sale.order.action_confirm

====================================================
REGLAS
====================================================

Para cada línea:

SI:
- producto almacenable
- tracking por lote

ENTONCES:

1. Validar atributos obligatorios.

2. Si line.lot_id existe:
- usar ese lote

3. Si no existe:
- buscar lote existente con mismo:
    - product_id
    - technical_key

4. Si existe y tiene stock:
- usar lote existente

5. Si no existe:
- crear lote nuevo

====================================================
8. CREACIÓN AUTOMÁTICA DE LOTES
====================================================

El lote nuevo debe:

- copiar product_id
- copiar technical_description
- copiar technical_key
- copiar atributos técnicos
- guardar sale_order_id
- guardar sale_order_line_id
- source_type = sale

====================================================
NOMBRE AUTOMÁTICO DEL LOTE
====================================================

Crear secuencia automática.

Formato:

PRODUCTCODE-SPECS-FECHA-CORRELATIVO

Ejemplo:

DPC-2X2-8FT-LGC22-20260518-0001

====================================================
REGLAS DE NORMALIZACIÓN
====================================================

- mayúsculas
- espacios → guiones
- remover caracteres inválidos
- limitar longitud
- evitar caracteres problemáticos para Odoo

====================================================
9. INVENTARIO
====================================================

Modificar vistas/reportes para mostrar:

- Producto
- Lote
- Especificaciones
- Ubicación
- Disponible

====================================================
EN STOCK.LOT
====================================================

Agregar:
- technical_description
- technical_key
- pestaña de especificaciones

====================================================
EN MOVIMIENTOS
====================================================

Mostrar:
- lote
- technical_description

====================================================
EN PICKINGS
====================================================

Propagar:
sale.order.line.lot_id
→ stock.move.line.lot_id

====================================================
10. REPORTES
====================================================

====================================================
COTIZACIÓN / ORDEN DE VENTA
====================================================

Debajo de cada línea mostrar:

- technical_description

====================================================
ENTREGA
====================================================

Mostrar:
- lote
- technical_description

====================================================
FACTURA
====================================================

Mostrar:
- technical_description
- lote

====================================================
11. VISTAS
====================================================

====================================================
MENÚS
====================================================

Ventas / Configuración / Atributos Técnicos
Ventas / Configuración / Valores de Atributos Técnicos

====================================================
PRODUCTOS
====================================================

Agregar pestaña:

"Atributos Técnicos"

====================================================
VENTAS
====================================================

Dentro de sale.order.line:

- sección expandible de especificaciones
- technical_description
- lot_id
- botón:
    - Buscar stock compatible
    - Copiar especificaciones

====================================================
LOTES
====================================================

Agregar pestaña:
"Especificaciones Técnicas"

====================================================
12. SEGURIDAD
====================================================

Crear access rights para:

- custom.technical.attribute
- custom.technical.attribute.value
- custom.product.technical.attribute.line
- custom.sale.order.line.technical.value
- custom.stock.lot.technical.value

====================================================
13. DEPENDENCIAS
====================================================

manifest:
- sale_management
- stock
- account
- uom

====================================================
14. RESTRICCIONES IMPORTANTES
====================================================

- NO usar variantes
- NO usar product.attribute
- NO usar product.attribute.value
- NO usar MRP
- NO crear un lote por unidad
- El lote representa la especificación técnica
- El producto representa la familia genérica

====================================================
15. ENTREGABLES
====================================================

Generar estructura completa:

metal_custom_specs_lot/
- __manifest__.py
- __init__.py
- models/
- views/
- security/
- data/
- reports/

====================================================
ARCHIVOS ESPERADOS
====================================================

models/
- technical_attribute.py
- product_template.py
- sale_order.py
- stock_lot.py
- stock_move.py

views/
- technical_attribute_views.xml
- product_template_views.xml
- sale_order_views.xml
- stock_lot_views.xml
- stock_inventory_views.xml

reports/
- sale_report_templates.xml
- stock_report_templates.xml
- account_report_templates.xml

security/
- ir.model.access.csv

data/
- ir_sequence_data.xml

====================================================
REQUERIMIENTO FINAL
====================================================

El código debe ser:
- limpio
- modular
- compatible con Odoo 18
- instalable
- mantenible
- sin datos demo
- usando buenas prácticas Odoo
- con vistas usables para vendedores

Sale order line views in Odoo 18 may use list views with optional expansion.

For expandable sections in sale order lines, Odoo 18 supports notebooks or custom widgets within the form view. Since sale order lines are usually displayed in a list/tree view, optional columns or the `widget="section_and_note_one2many"` can be used to show additional fields when expanded. Alternatively, a popup form with a technical specs tab can be implemented for detailed views.

For better UX in Odoo 18, extend the sale.order.line form view with a collapsible "Especificaciones Tcnicas" group using `colspan` and conditional visibility. Use `optional="show"` columns in the tree view for technical descriptions. The form view allows users to click into a line to see technical specs in a collapsed section, while the list view shows relevant data like technical descriptions and stock indicators. This approach enhances usability by keeping the interface clean while providing access to detailed information on demand.

1.

Extended tree views for sale order lines include technical descriptions and compatible lot quantities, while form views allow inline editing of technical values and include dedicated buttons.

Dynamic loading of technical values on product change is implemented by overriding `@api.onchange('product_id')` and the `write()` method during creation.

The `_prepare_technical_values_from_product` method is defined to load technical attributes from the product template, initializing an empty list of technical value records before populating them based on the product's template.

for each technical attribute line in the template, the default value is set based on the attribute typeeither as a selection value or numeric value from the name field.

vals['value_number'] = float(default_val.name) if possible else vals['value_text'] = default_val.name
vals_list.append((0, 0, vals))
self.technical_value_ids = vals_list

For building technical_key, normalize values by using uppercase attribute codes and normalized values from value_id.code, name, value_number, or value_text.

def _get_technical_value_normalized(self, tech_value):

```

Technical keys are built by joining normalized attribute values with their codes, sorted by sequence. Lot names use abbreviated spec parts concatenated together. The module will include all standard directories and files, with extensions to stock picking to pass lot IDs to move lines during validation. Alternatively, _prepare_procurement_values or stock.rule can be overridden for the same purpose.

To propagate lot_id from sale.order.line to stock.move.line, the system stores lot_id on the sale order line and uses overrides in sale.order.line or sale_stock to pass the lot to procurement. During sale confirmation, stock moves are created, and the lot_id is set on move lines when reserved or confirmed. The standard approach involves overriding `_prepare_procurement_values` in sale.order.line to include lot_id in procurement values. In Odoo 18, sale_stock should handle this behavior, but it's verified whether it already exists or needs customization.

For managing lots in MTO scenarios, a hook during `stock.move.line` creation or override of `_action_assign` in `stock.move` is needed. Alternatively, extending `_prepare_stock_moves` on `sale.order.line` in the `sale_stock` module can pass lot IDs. In recent Odoo versions, `stock.move` includes a `restrict_lot_id` field to enforce specific lot usage, which can be leveraged by adding this field to stock moves when creating them from sale order lines.

I'll add a method to sale.order.line that extends stock move preparation to include lot restrictions:

```python
def _prepare_stock_moves(self, picking):
    moves = super()._prepare_stock_moves(picking)
    for move_vals in moves:
        if self.lot_id:
            move_vals['restrict_lot_id'] = self.lot_id.id
    return moves
```

In Odoo 18, the field name for restricting lots on stock moves is likely `restrict_lot_id`, though it could also be `lot_ids`. This ensures that when a sale order line has a lot assigned, the corresponding stock move will enforce that lot during assignment.

For displaying move line information, the technical description can be shown through a related field from the lot.</details></think>

Continue with stock views, wizards XML, and reports.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Fix the abstract model where CustomSaleOrderLineTechnicalValue inherits a mixin but incorrectly calls self._format_number on the tech_value record; it should use the mixin's formatting method instead.

In technical_attribute.py, the code incorrectly calls `self._format_number` on the tech_value record instead of using the mixin's formatting method, even though the mixin is inherited. For the default_get on the compatible wizard, line_ids must be returned as a list of commands, and the current implementation correctly sets `res['line_ids'] = sale_line._prepare_compatible_lot_wizard_lines()` which returns the proper format. Additionally, when the wizard's default_get is called from `action_search_compatible_lots`, the context includes `default_sale_order_line_id`.

Fix the sale order line form inheritance in Odoo 18, checking for `sale.view_order_line_tree` or falling back to `sale.sale_order_line_view_form` or a standalone form view. If `sale.sale_order_line_view_form_readonly` does not exist, ensure the form view is properly referenced. Consider using `sale.view_order_form` for embedded forms and handle different views for editable lists and line form openings.

Users can open lines by clicking their description.  
Fix the technical_description field to be read-only since it's stored and computed, preventing manual edits that get overwritten.  
Update fields in sale_order.py as needed.  
Skip creating a README file as per user preference.  
Perform a Python syntax check across all Python files.

For the stock delivery report, avoid using risky xpaths like `//table[hasclass('table', 'table-sm')]` that may not work in Odoo 18, and instead use safer alternatives such as inheriting the `stock.report_delivery_has_serial_move_line` template or using `//div[@id='informations']` for positioning. Simplify the stock report to only include the picking report, which is easier to manage.

For the sale report, use a safer xpath such as `<xpath expr="//span[@t-field='line.name']" position="after">` to ensure compatibility. Update report files accordingly to improve stability and maintainability.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

El módulo **`kc_product_custom_specs_lot`** está creado en tu workspace con la estructura solicitada. Resumen de lo implementado:

## Ubicación

`c:\Users\Admin\Documents\OdooDeveloper\Odoo18\Emsoind\kc_product_custom_specs_lot\`

## Arquitectura

| Capa | Implementación |
|------|----------------|
| Producto genérico | `product.template` + pestaña **Atributos Técnicos** |
| Especificaciones en venta | `custom.sale.order.line.technical.value` (One2many dinámico) |
| Stock diferenciado | `stock.lot` con `technical_key`, `technical_description` y valores técnicos |
| Sin variantes | No se usa `product.attribute` ni variantes |

## Modelos principales

- `custom.technical.attribute` / `custom.technical.attribute.value`
- `custom.product.technical.attribute.line`
- `custom.sale.order.line.technical.value`
- `custom.stock.lot.technical.value`
- Extensiones: `sale.order.line`, `sale.order`, `stock.lot`, `stock.move`, `account.move.line`

## Flujo de negocio

1. **Producto**: configurar atributos técnicos por plantilla (obligatorios, valores permitidos, default).
2. **Cotización**: al elegir producto se cargan los atributos; se generan `technical_description` y `technical_key` (p. ej. `ANCHO=2|ALTO=2|...`).
3. **Stock compatible**: botón abre wizard con lotes del mismo producto y clave técnica con cantidad > 0.
4. **Copiar specs**: wizard para copiar desde otra línea del mismo pedido.
5. **Confirmar venta**: valida obligatorios, reutiliza `lot_id` o busca/crea lote único por especificación (no un lote por unidad).
6. **Nombre de lote**: secuencia `stock.lot.technical` → formato `CODIGO-SPECS-YYYYMMDD-0001`.
7. **Entrega**: `restrict_lot_id` en movimientos + propagación a líneas de movimiento.

## Vistas y menús

- **Ventas → Configuración → Atributos Técnicos** (y valores)
- Pestaña en producto, sección expandible en líneas de pedido, pestaña en lotes
- Indicadores: stock compatible, lote seleccionado, sin stock

## Instalación

1. Añadir la ruta al `addons_path` de Odoo 18.
2. Actualizar lista de aplicaciones.
3. Instalar **KC Producto: Especificaciones Técnicas por Lote**.
4. Configurar productos genéricos con **tracking por lote** y atributos técnicos.

## Configuración inicial sugerida

1. Crear atributos (`ANCHO`, `ALTO`, `LONGITUD`, `CALIBRE`, `GRADOS`, etc.) con `code` sin espacios.
2. Crear valores (p. ej. `2"`, `LG`, `C22`).
3. En cada producto metálico genérico, pestaña **Atributos Técnicos**.
4. Probar cotización → buscar stock → confirmar → verificar lote en inventario/entrega.

## Archivos generados

```
kc_product_custom_specs_lot/
├── __manifest__.py
├── __init__.py
├── data/ir_sequence_data.xml
├── models/
│   ├── technical_mixin.py
│   ├── technical_attribute.py
│   ├── product_template.py
│   ├── sale_order.py
│   ├── stock_lot.py
│   ├── stock_move.py
│   └── stock_quant.py
├── wizard/
│   ├── compatible_lot_wizard.py
│   └── copy_technical_specs_wizard.py
├── views/
├── reports/
└── security/ir.model.access.csv
```

## Notas

- Los reportes heredan plantillas estándar de Odoo 18; si algún xpath no coincide con personalizaciones locales, puede requerir un ajuste menor al instalar.
- La vista de línea usa el formulario embebido bajo `order_line` (expandible al editar la línea) más columnas opcionales en la lista.
- Tras instalar, conviene validar en tu instancia: confirmación de pedido, reserva por lote y PDF de cotización/entrega/factura.

Si quieres, en un siguiente paso puedo añadir **datos maestros de ejemplo** (ducto, codo, bandeja) o ajustar el formato del nombre de lote a tu convención exacta.

## Qué se hizo

- **Icono:** `kc_product_custom_specs_lot/static/description/icon.png`
- **Diseño:** perfil metálico con cotas técnicas (naranja) y etiqueta de lote, fondo azul oscuro, estilo icono de app Odoo.
- **Manifest:** se añadió `'images': ['static/description/icon.png']` para que aparezca en la lista de aplicaciones.

## Cómo verlo

1. Actualiza la lista de aplicaciones (o reinicia el servicio Odoo si hace falta).
2. Busca **KC Producto: Especificaciones Técnicas por Lote** en Aplicaciones.

Si no cambia de inmediato, prueba con caché limpia del navegador o actualiza el módulo desde Apps.

The `restrict_lot_id` field does not exist in core Odoo 18; it is part of the OCA module `stock_restrict_lot`.

The user's Odoo instance lacks the `restrict_lot_id` field, which is part of the OCA module `stock_restrict_lot`. To address this:

1. Replace `lot_technical_description` on `stock.move` with a computed field using `sale_line_id.lot_id` or `move_line_ids.lot_id` instead of the missing `restrict_lot_id`.
2. Remove `restrict_lot_id` from `_prepare_procurement_values` in `sale_order.py`, implementing an alternative mechanism.
3. Remove `restrict_lot_id` from relevant views.

To propagate lots from sales to stock moves without `restrict_lot_id`:
- Maintain `_prepare_move_line_vals` on `stock.move` using `sale_line_id.lot_id`
- Consider using context or a custom field on `stock.move` to store the intended lot

A custom field `kc_lot_id` is added to `stock.move` to store the technical lot information. This field is used for the technical description, populates `_prepare_move_line_vals`, and propagates from sale order lines during confirmation. For procurement, `_prepare_move_line_vals` handles lot assignment, and `_action_assign` is overridden or modified to set lots on move lines when moves are created. The full implementation requires reviewing `stock_move.py` and `sale_order.py`.

For `_prepare_procurement_values`, remove `restrict_lot_id` and either pass values that `sale_stock` understands or set `kc_lot_id` after move creation.  

A better approach is to:
1. Add `kc_lot_id` (Many2one stock.lot) on `stock.move` to store the lot from the sale line.
2. Add `kc_lot_id` as a related field on `sale.order.line` when creating movesextend `_prepare_stock_move_vals` or the relevant method in Odoo 18 `sale_stock`.

Check Odoo 18s `sale_stock` module to understand how stock moves are generated from sale lines. In Odoo 18, `sale.order.line` may use:
- `_prepare_procurement_values`
- Stock moves created with a values dictionary

I'll search for sale order line stock move preparation in Odoo 18 GitHub.

To implement the solution, add a custom field `kc_lot_id` on `stock.move` to store the lot from the sale line. This field can be used to populate `lot_technical_description` and handle lot assignment during move creation. On `sale.order.line`, override `_prepare_procurement_values` to pass the lot ID to the procurement values, which will then be used to set `kc_lot_id` on the corresponding stock move. This approach avoids relying on the missing `restrict_lot_id` field while maintaining proper lot propagation from sales to stock moves.

Procurement values typically only set known stock.move fields during creation; custom fields may require overrides like `_prepare_stock_move_vals` in `sale.order.line`. In Odoo 18, `sale_stock` creates stock moves from procurement using a dictionary that maps directly to stock.move fields. Custom fields must be handled via `_prepare_stock_move_vals` to ensure proper propagation. The standard `_prepare_procurement_values` method in `sale.order.line` can be extended to include custom lot IDs in procurement values, which are then used to set custom fields like `kc_lot_id` on the resulting stock moves.

And stock.rules create moves, so custom fields may need to be set in the move creation hook.

A safer approach is to override the sale order confirmation or stock move creation:

```python
class SaleOrder(models.Model):
    def action_confirm(self):
        ...
        res = super().action_confirm()
        for order in self:
            order._apply_lots_to_stock_moves()
        return res
    
    def _apply_lots_to_stock_moves(self):
        for line in self.order_line:
            if line.lot_id:
                moves = line.move_ids.filtered(lambda m: m.state not in ('done', 'cancel'))
```</details></think>

El fallo venía de usar **`restrict_lot_id`**, que **no existe en el núcleo de Odoo 18** (solo en módulos OCA como `stock_restrict_lot`).

## Cambios realizados

1. **`stock.move`**: campo propio `kc_lot_id` y `lot_technical_description` relacionado con ese lote.
2. **`sale.order.line`**: en `_prepare_procurement_values` se envía `kc_lot_id` en lugar de `restrict_lot_id`.
3. **`sale.order`**: tras confirmar, `_kc_apply_lots_to_stock_moves()` asigna el lote a los movimientos de stock.
4. **Vista de albarán**: columna actualizada a `kc_lot_id`.

La propagación del lote a las líneas de movimiento sigue en `_prepare_move_line_vals`, usando `kc_lot_id` o el lote de la línea de venta.

## Qué hacer en el servidor

1. Sincroniza el código actualizado del módulo.
2. Reinicia Odoo (o actualiza el módulo si ya se instaló a medias).
3. Vuelve a instalar **kc_product_custom_specs_lot**.

Si la instalación anterior quedó a medias, puede hacer falta desinstalar el módulo roto desde la base (modo desarrollador → Apps) o limpiar el registro en `ir_module_module` antes de reinstalar.

[The stock.picking Model: Odoo's Transfer and Warehouse Operations Explained | Dasolo](https://www.dasolo.ai/blog/odoo-data-api-5/odoo-stock-picking-model-guide-161)\n\n# Odoo 18 Stock Picking Form: move_ids_without_package and move_line_ids\n\n## Key Fields\n\nIn Odoo stock pickings, &#96;move_ids_without_package&#96; is a tree view field representing stock moves in the Operations section of the picking form, while &#96;move_line_ids&#96; contains the detailed operations with lot/serial tracking information.[5]\n\n## Important Issue: picking_id Field\n\nA critical fix for Odoo 18 requires adding the &#96;picking_id&#96; field to the &#96;move_ids_without_package&#96; tree view. When creating virtual stock moves (without saving) and directly validating the picking, the associated &#96;stock.move.line&#96; records were not properly linked to the picking.[2][4]\n\n**Solution:** Add &#96;picking_id&#96; as a column_invisible field in the tree view definition:[2]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;xml\n\u003cfield name=\"picking_id\" column_invisible=\"True\"/\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThis ensures that when you use operations like \"Pick From\" to create move lines, they are properly associated with the picking_id and will appear on reports like the Delivery Slip.[2][4]\n\n## Related Behavior\n\nWhen changing the &#96;partner_id&#96; on an unsaved picking with newly added moves, the virtual moves in &#96;move_ids_without_package&#96; could disappear. This occurs because updating &#96;picking_type_id&#96; invalidates the &#96;move_ids_without_package&#96; field through a computed domain dependency.[3]",
